title: A Strange New Crewmate
description: On pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this part focuses on a new crewmate and a new mystery. Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
scene: This scene belongs to the A New Crewmate and a New Mystery sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Mr. 2 Bon Clay, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I have something important to discuss...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Is unbelit- ting of an Okama!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ms. Hina! The decoy is the sheep!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's time to move! Full speed ahead!

summary: Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
